item.scguns_oregunized.assassin_dagger_t: An easily concealed, sharply honed dagger often used for the assassinations by members of the Order
item.sledgehammer.tooltip: Landing critical hits applies Brain Damage
item.scguns_oregunized.medal_of_honor_to: The highest military award given to brave legionnaires of the White Wolf Union for outstanding deeds.
raid.scguns.stellar_order.name: Summons the Stellar Order
raid.announcement.scguns_oregunized.stel: The Strike Force of the Order is here!
raid.scguns.white_wolf.name: Summons the White Wolf Union
scguns.desc.whirlwind: Scientists, engineers, ministers. People who knew about the horrors happening in the Federacy and didn't stand aside, formed the Stellar Order to fight in the shadow.
scguns.desc.hermes: A powerful hand cannon that helped the Stellar Order deal with paranormal activities inside the secret laboratories of the Federacy.
scguns.desc.avantrima: Quick burst of 4 rounds guaranteed success in every covert operation and made it a reliable standard issue of Arphilem strike force.
scguns.desc.jackrabbit: Underwater assault rifle for specials occasions. Aquatic weapons are highly niche concept, but when you need them, you need them really bad.
scguns.desc.canter: Long range rifle cut down for portability. Barrel length allowed for usage both at medium and close ranges.
scguns.desc.haretrot: Extra quiet, extra deadly. Sharp lead bolts fired under the high pressure were able to penetrate any armor worn by the Asgharian forces.
scguns.desc.volter_sp: First shockarm experiment of the Order; this easily concealable electric scatter pistol has proven to be a trusty sidearm.
scguns.desc.mactricia: Standard Issue of the Volter's Sector strike force, a subdivision organized by the brilliant engineer and commander Volter to simplify the management of the Order.
scguns.desc.amperbreaker: Production of this weapon was a pain to the Stellar Order, but that doesn't compare to the pain of those who had to suffer through the horrors of the soul harvesting.
scguns.desc.jupiter-7: Directed Redstone flux energy conducted through the amethyst crystal creates a powerful light beam capable of scorching the enemy flesh.
scguns.desc.wolfhound: Standard issue sidearm of the White Wolf Union's newly formed standing army. Helical magazine design was innovative, but inconvenient.
scguns.desc.warthog: Civilian use carbine with a stylish lever. Despite its outdated design, this weapon was still popular on the front lines.
scguns.desc.tirone_smg: Adapted design of the first ever recoil-operated "Machine Rifle" produced by the FAC. Energy from the recoil automatically ejected spent casings and loaded new rounds.
scguns.desc.tirone_conversion: Tirone SMG conversion variant for close quarter combat. It trades long-range accuracy for immense firepower.
scguns.desc.chimera: Light machine gun constructed early in the war. Slow to maneuver, but is capable of delivering long bursts tearing through groups of Federal soldiers.
scguns.desc.prospector: Heavily armored Federal units created an urgent need for powerful yet portable weapons. This heavy duty battle rifle sacrifices controllability for greater lethality.
scguns.desc.apotheosis: Straight bolt design allowed for quick yet precise firing, making it ideal for maintaining continuous pressure on the enemy even on long ranges.
scguns.desc.nemesis: The perfect trench cleaning solution. Unknown fiery substance was capable of instantly melting the lead tip, scattering molten slag all around.
scguns.desc.megatherium: Heavy machine gun designed for firing from fortified positions. Production of Megatherium could be considered an unwise waste of resources.
scguns.desc.duster: Desperate pneumatic SMG cobbled from leftover resources. Its production signaled the war's nearing end.
scguns.desc.trenchbroom: Air powered pump-action shotgun for close-quarter trench warfare. Its sharp flechettes fired under high pressure, struck terror into the enemy.
tooltip.lead_round.description: Deals extra damage to targets with Brain Damage effect
tooltip.incendiary_round.description: Sets on fire and deals extra damage to targets with Brain Damage effect
